VERIFIED CLIENT STORIES · 4 CONTINENTS · 15 YEARS

What founders, CTOs & product leads say about us.

Real words from real clients across four continents — auction operators in the UK, founders in the US, marketplaces in Australia, and procurement teams across Europe.

15+
Years building production software
100+
Production deliveries
4
Continents we serve
150+
Full-time engineers
"Excellent Work. Quality, awesome and fully knowledgeable Team. Always like to work with them. Communication is very good with E-Multitech Solution and they always understand what i need. I just need to give a word and they understand it quickly and bring all my concepts on real working software in front of me. I am very much impressed with there art of working."
Bob Brick
Miami, USA
🇺🇸
"Great experience working with these guys. Can highly recommend. Great software and a great team to work with. They were happy to work with my designs and to accommodate changes as and when. They are always available when needed to customize my site to my requirements and answer any technical questions."
Simon Grady
United Kingdom
🇬🇧
"It Was excellent experiences to work with E-Multitech Solution. Best communication and Technically Strong. I worked with E – Multitech Solution over the last few months to build my new site. They have fully supported me throughout the process and always been responsive when I have not understood something or needed advice. They are always responsive at any day of the week. I now have a website that is functioning superbly thanks to E- Multitech Solution. I am going to work in future as well with them."
Tim Quin
London, UK
🇬🇧
"Amazing. I can only have words of thanks. Professional and attentive, ease of use and speed in making changes. It is fast, reliable and without connection problems. The technical service is fantastic, always attentive and solve any problem in less than 24 hours. I think it's a great software with some workers behind totally incredible. Whenever you peer vovleria to trust it."
Guillermo Lorenzo
Spain
🇪🇸
"It's been, and still is, a pleasure working with E-Mulititechsolution. Having worked with the team at E-Mulititechsolution for the past year, I would not hesitate to recommend them to anyone wishing to develop an online business. Even though I am based in Singapore and they are in Nepal, through constant communication we managed to develop my online auction business in a professional and timely manner. To date, we are continually working towards developing and enhancing my business offerings."
Allan Muir
Singapore
🇸🇬
"E-multitech had set-up my penny auction website for us in Singapore, I found out the customer service is excellent. I have no experience with online website business, but luckily I found E-multitech. They are helpful and gives us help & guide all the way. Almost everyday I was talking to the project manager, and all my requests and e-mails were promptly dealt with & often instantly. We also can keep upgrading & improve in our website. As they keep updating & recommending suggest to our site. I highly recommend this company for anyone who would like to develop a website & have a good support team for your website."
Willy Chew
Singapore
🇸🇬
"If only I had engaged E-Multitech initially. My website would have been running 2 years earlier and I would have less grey hair. Unfortunately, it took me 2 other freelance programmers (with disastrous, stressful results), before I engaged E-Multitech to create my website and from the moment we started working together I knew I had finally found the right people. They are also very competitive when it comes to price. My relationship with E-Multitech remains ongoing and I don't intend to go anywhere else for work of this nature. When you find a good thing, best to stick with it. I highly recommend them."
Mick Denny
Murwillumbah NSW, Australia
